name: WILSON-MIKITY SYNDROME
definition: PULMONARY DYSMATURITY similarity to bronchopulmonary dysplasia in normal preterm infants breathing room air; rarely
discriminating_features: reticular pattern radiating from both hila
small bubbly lucencies throughout both lungs (identical to bronchopulmonary dysplasia)

general: reticular pattern radiating from both hila
small bubbly lucencies throughout both lungs (identical to bronchopulmonary dysplasia)
